chief_complaint: A 45-year-old man presented with episodes of chest pain at rest.
history: The patient has a history of eczema, dyslipidemia, Gramineae allergy, and past tobacco use. He participated in a 3-day camping trip during which he was regularly exposed to campfire smoke.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: ECG: clinically negative; Coronography: no significant stenosis; Cardiac MRI: no myocardial fibrosis; PET: no myocardial ischemia or necrotic sequelae.
